summary:
So Kenneth, where did you go these days?
Well, it’s a loooong story. But I’ll try to tell you in detailed.
After I posted a post in 23/06/25, I was been surrounded by tones of schoolwork and projects. (You know, that’s how Chinese students’ everyday belike) So this blog was left unfinished and the site owner seemed like dead. (Just Kidding)
Actually I was preparing for my TOEFL exam during Oct.

title: Blog Update

summary: Glad to see you again! I know it’s such a long time that I haven’t posted anything new on my blog, it is all because we are having a exam last week and I have to review everything I learned just to get a good grade on the final score. No don’t try to ask me I will never tell you my score LOL. So apparently the exam is over and we are going to have Summer Holidays!
